title: T-025 — UI: FIN-004 Inventory Valuation + FIN-005 Material/Labor Variance + MODAL-06 FIFO drill + MODAL-07 Variance Note (§8.1, §8.4)
prompt:
# T-025 — Inventory Valuation + Material/Labor Variance pages + 2 modals

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.1 FIN-004 + FIN-005 (PRD numbering: PRD FIN-004 Inventory Valuation = UX FIN-005 — see §8.6 matrix); §8.4 FIN-005 Inventory Valuation Report (UX canonical) [UNIVERSAL]; §8.5 MODAL-06 + MODAL-07; §11.4 V-FIN-INV-* + §11.5 V-FIN-VAR-*.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:1-117` (`fin_inventory_valuation`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:252-357` (`fin_material_variance`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:359-452` (`fin_labor_variance`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:385-428` (`fifo_layers_modal`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:430-463` (`variance_note_modal`)

## Goal
Three pages + two modals delivering PRD FIN-004 (PRD §8.1 'Inventory Valuation') and PRD FIN-005 (PRD §8.1 'Variance Dashboard'); UX renumbers FIN-004 to UX FIN-005, and PRD FIN-005 splits into UX FIN-007/008 material + labor variance pages.

## Prototype parity
References pinned above. shadcn primitives per index entries.
Parity checklist FIN-004 (UX FIN-005):
1. Method Toggle (FIFO / WAC) + AsOf DatePicker + Apply Button bound to URL params via nuqs.
2. Two-card summary: 'Total Inventory Value' (GBP, item count, method, as-of date) + 'Value Distribution' (4 horizontal mini-bars per item_type: RM / Packaging / WIP / FG).
3. Filter bar: search, item type, location (cross-ref 05-WH locations), aging bucket Select (0-30 / 30-60 / 60-90 / 90+ days), value range.
4. DataTable: Item Code, Name, Type, Qty on Hand (3dp), UOM, Avg Unit Cost (4dp mono), Total Value, FIFO Layers (integer link → MODAL-06), AgingBadge, Last Movement, Actions kebab.
5. Page total + grand total footer.
6. 'Recalculate' CTA → background job; toast 'Recalculation queued'.
7. WAC inline view (kebab → View WAC): shows item_wac_state.avg_cost + total_qty_kg + total_value + last_updated_at.
Parity checklist FIN-005 (material variance UX FIN-007):
1. 3 KPI tiles (Total / Price / Usage variance); Phase 2 MPV/MQV tiles muted + Badge 'Phase 2 — EPIC 10-I' per BL-FIN-01.
2. Multi-filter bar: period preset, date range, item search, item type, cost center, variance type, significance threshold.
3. VarBadge component (reused from T-019).
4. 'View WOs' Link or Popover per item.
5. 'Drill' Button → routes to T-026 drilldown.
6. 'Note' Button → opens MODAL-07.
Parity checklist FIN-005 (labor variance UX FIN-008):
1. 3 KPI tiles (Total Labor Var / LRV Phase 2 / LEV Phase 2 muted + Badge).
2. Filter bar: period, date range, production_line, cost center, manufacturing_operation, variance type.
3. Labor Table: WO, Operation, Line, Std/Actual Hrs/Rate/Cost, Variance, %.
4. 'View WO' button → FIN-003 detail.
Parity checklist MODAL-06 (FIFO Layers):
1. Dialog size 'wide'; read-only; Close button only.
2. Table: Layer number / exhausted icon, Receipt Date, Source (Link to PO/TO), Qty In, Qty Remaining, Unit Cost (4dp mono), Layer Value (GBP), Exhausted badge.
3. Summary: Total Qty, Total Value, Active Layers (count).
Parity checklist MODAL-07 (Variance Note):
1. Dialog size 'default'.
2. Category Select (6 categories from VARIANCE_NOTE_CATEGORIES const).
3. Note Textarea Zod min 20 max 1000 with live char counter.
4. Polymorphic context: shows WO or item summary.
5. Save → INSERT variance_notes (T-021 schema) + optionally notify finance_manager via notification outbox.

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/inventory-valuation/page.tsx` (RSC) — fetch valuation via `getInventoryValuation(method, asOf, filters)` from new server action.
2. `app/finance/inventory-valuation/_components/inventory-table.tsx`.
3. `app/finance/inventory-valuation/_components/fifo-layers-modal.tsx` — MODAL-06.
4. `app/finance/variance/material/page.tsx` + `_components/material-variance-table.tsx`.
5. `app/finance/variance/labor/page.tsx` + `_components/labor-variance-table.tsx`.
6. `app/finance/_components/variance-note-modal.tsx` — MODAL-07 (shared, used by T-020 and T-026 too).
7. `app/finance/_components/aging-badge.tsx` shared primitive.
8. Server actions for variance reads (filtered queries via Drizzle).

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/inventory-valuation/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/inventory-valuation/_components/inventory-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/inventory-valuation/_components/fifo-layers-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/variance/material/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/variance/material/_components/material-variance-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/variance/labor/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/variance/labor/_components/labor-variance-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/variance-note-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/aging-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_actions/inventory-valuation.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_actions/variance.ts [create]
- (one __tests__ test per component + actions test)

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given Inventory Valuation page renders with method=FIFO + asOf=today, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:1-117, then 2-card summary + filter bar + DataTable + footer totals match — RTL snapshot + parity checklist. AND given user toggles to WAC and clicks Apply, when URL=?method=WAC, then DataTable values switch to WAC avg_cost and total_value.
- Given FIFO Layers count cell clicked, when MODAL-06 opens, then rows from inventory_cost_layers ORDER BY receipt_date ASC with is_exhausted styling. AND given exhausted layer, when rendered in MODAL-06, then line-through opacity-50 + 'Exhausted' Badge.
- Given Material Variance page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:252-357, then 3 KPI tiles + Phase 2 badge placeholders + filter bar + DataTable + VarBadge + Drill/Note buttons match. AND given Labor Variance page renders, when compared to prototype, then all 3 labor breakdown charts + drill-through links render correctly.
- Given MODAL-07 with note_text length 15, when Submit, then Zod min(20) blocks with FormMessage. AND given MODAL-07 receives ctx.wo, when opened, then Summary shows WO link; saving inserts variance_notes with wo_id set.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: one test per page + per modal asserting parity, URL-driven method/asOf, FIFO drill opening with correct data, exhausted row styling, Phase 2 badge presence, Zod min-length on note, polymorphic note context.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/inventory-valuation apps/web/app/finance/variance`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not show negative inventory (filter out items with item_wac_state.total_qty_kg < 0 — guarded by V-FIN-INV-04 at write).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not use HTML `<select>`.
- Do not skip the Phase 2 placeholder badges (BL-FIN-01 visibility).
- Do not allow saving variance_notes without wo_id OR item_id (T-021 CHECK).
- Do not regress accessibility.

pipeline_inputs.description: 3 pages (Inventory Valuation + Material Variance + Labor Variance) + 2 modals (FIFO Layers + Variance Note). Reusable AgingBadge + VarianceNoteModal extracted under app/finance/_components.

MPV/MQV/LRV/LEV decomposition deferred (BL-FIN-01 P2 EPIC 10-I). Variance Note modal is polymorphic (WO context OR item context).
